Pandowdy Apple IIe Emulator
Table of Contents

Interface IEmulatorState

Namespace
Pandowdy.EmuCore.Interfaces
Assembly
Pandowdy.EmuCore.dll

Provides access to the emulator's execution state (PC, SP, cycle count, etc.). Supports reactive subscriptions and control operations (pause, continue, step).

public interface IEmulatorState

Properties

Stream

Observable stream of emulator state snapshots.

IObservable<StateSnapshot> Stream { get; }

Property Value

IObservable<StateSnapshot>

Methods

GetCurrent()

Gets the current emulator state snapshot.

StateSnapshot GetCurrent()

Returns

StateSnapshot

RequestContinue()

Requests the emulator to continue execution.

void RequestContinue()

RequestPause()

Requests the emulator to pause execution.

void RequestPause()

RequestStep()

Requests the emulator to execute a single instruction step.

void RequestStep()

Update(StateSnapshot)

Updates the emulator state with a new snapshot.

void Update(StateSnapshot snapshot)

Parameters

snapshot StateSnapshot
